activation-mode.name: Activation Mode
activation-mode.description:
Defines when to activate Battle Mode, aka, all the mod's features. 

- 'On Start' will activate the mod as soon as the level starts.
- 'Mid-Game Keybind' will let you activate the mod at any time using a keybind (default: Q).

party-char1.name: Party - Character 1
party-char1.description: The character to use in the Deltarune styled tab. Affects max HP value. If the current level is a demon, max HP gets a +40 bonus (putting the delta warriors in their Ch4 health values).

party-char2.name: Party - Character 2
party-char2.description: Same as before, but defines your second party member.

party-char3.name: Party - Character 3
party-char3.description: Same as before, but defines your third party member.

keyind-title.name: Keybinds
keyind-title.description: Configure the mod's main keybinds used in gameplay features.

activation-keybind.name: Mid-Game Activation
activation-keybind.description: The keybind used to toggle the mod's effects mid-gameplay

heal-keybind.name: Heal Action
heal-keybind.description: The keybind used to Heal as a party member mid-game.

defend-keybind.name: Defend Action
defend-keybind.description: The keybind used to Defend as a party member in-game.

soul-title.name: Soul Mode Settings
soul-title.description: Settings for the mod's 'Soul Mode' visual feature.

enable-soul.name: Soul Mode
enable-soul.description: Replaces the player icon with the soul.

soulmode-keepat0rot.name: Soul Mode - Keep Soul Upright
soulmode-keepat0rot.description: Keeps the Soul sprite upright (at 0 rotation) despite of your current gravity or gamemode. If disabled, the soul CAN flip in the Y axis, similar to, say, the Sans fight in Undertale.

soulmode-colormode.name: Soul Mode - Color Mode
soulmode-colormode.description:
Defines how to choose which colors to use for the soul on each gamemode. The 2 available modes are: 

- GD Color: Uses the Gamemode Portal Colors to color the soul. (So, cube will be green, ship will be pink, etc)
- UTDR Color: Uses the Soul colors from UT/DR and applies the most fitting for your current gamemode to the soul.

soulmode-static-color.name: Soul Mode - Static Color
soulmode-static-color.description: Disables changing the soul color based on the current gamemode. If this is enabled, the soul will always use your P1 color.

party-ui-scale.name: UI Scale - Party UI
party-ui-scale.description: Controls the scale of the Party Members UI elements located at the bottom of the screen.

tp-ui-scale.name: UI Scale - TP Bar
tp-ui-scale.description: Controls the scale of the TP Bar UI element located at the left side of the screen.

graze-scale.name: Graze Effect Scale
graze-scale.description: Controls the scale of the graze effect visual (Normal Mode only)

always-imitate-deltarune-pos.name: Damage/Down/Heal indicators - Always Imitate Deltarune X Position
always-imitate-deltarune-pos.description: Always positions the damage, downed and healing indicators to the left side of the screen, like on Deltarune's battle screen, instead of trying to fetch the Player's screen pos.

enable-songlabel.name: Enable Song Label at level start
enable-songlabel.description:
Enables showing a label with the name of the currently playing song, similar to the one text that shows up ONCE in Deltarune chapter 1, showing 'Field of Hopes and Dreams'

This does not depend on the mod's soft-toggle, so u can disable the rest of the features and keep this enabled!

songlabel-showartist.name: Song Label - Show Artist Name
songlabel-showartist.description: Shows the Artist's name in the Song label, like: 'Artist - Song Name' instead of only showing the Song's name.
